## Summary

- Describe the change clearly and concretely.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pnpm generate:readme` if content inventory changed
- [ ] I ran `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] I ran `pnpm lint`
- [ ] I ran `pnpm build`
- [ ] I updated docs where needed
- [ ] I included screenshots for UI changes

## Notes

- Add migration notes, rollout concerns, or follow-up work if relevant.
